name: Log4Pot
description: A honeypot for the Log4Shell vulnerability (CVE-2021-44228). Tool: https://github.com/thomaspatzke/Log4Pot. [SCAFFOLD generated from XORCISM.TOOL #437 by tool_to_connector.py — implement run() in run.py to map Log4Pot output to the XORCISM findings model {assets, services, cpes, vulns}.]

parameters.name: target
parameters.help: Host, URL or path the tool acts on. When implementing, consider type 'target' or 'url' so the runner enforces the engagement scope.

parameters.name: file
parameters.help: Offline mode: a saved Log4Pot output file to parse instead of running it live.
